description: Layout rules — grid alignment, element placement, and spacing constraints

alignment.description: All elements must align to the 12-column grid or have exact px coordinates

overlap_rules.description: Decorative elements may overlap up to 15%; content elements must not overlap

balance.description: 25-45% of the slide must be whitespace; content must not be biased to one side

hierarchy.description: Title must be the largest text; visual hierarchy must be clear

element_count.description: Minimum 3, maximum 20 elements per slide. At least 2 different element types required
